## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Scaffold/infra
- [ ] Behavior change
- [ ] Test update

## Validation

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] Manual CLI smoke test

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed.
- [ ] Added or updated tests.
- [ ] No benchmark result artifacts committed.
